profile.heading: User Profile

apiKey.created: API key created — copy it now

uploads.heading: File Uploads & Attachments

uploads.galleryDescription: Up to 6 images, parallel XHR uploads with real progress
uploads.documentsDescription: Simulated — the backend only accepts images (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, AVIF). This section shows where a real generic-file route would go.

advanced.heading: Advanced Form Patterns
advanced.submitFailed: Registration failed — check the errors below

elements.heading: Form Elements
elements.description: Input groups, selects, textareas, checkboxes, radios, toggles, and validation states
elements.input_info: A standard text input for entering any type of information
elements.inputWithPlaceholder_info: Shows placeholder text when empty, demonstrating user guidance
elements.selectInput_info: A dropdown menu for choosing a single option from a list
elements.passwordInput_info: Masks characters for secure password entry
elements.datePicker_info: Opens a native date picker for selecting a calendar date
elements.timeSelect_info: Native time picker for selecting hours and minutes
elements.emailGroup_info: Enter a valid email address in the format user@example.com
elements.phoneGroup_info: Phone number with country code prefix selector
elements.cardNumberGroup_info: Credit card number with card type icon indicator
elements.websiteGroup_info: Website URL with automatic http:// protocol prefix
elements.referralGroup_info: A referral code with one-click copy button
elements.amountGroup_info: Currency amount input with $ prefix and USD suffix
elements.singleSelect_info: A native dropdown for selecting a single option
elements.multiSelect_info: Select multiple options from a list — each selection appears as a removable chip
elements.textareaDefault_info: A standard multi-line text area for longer content
elements.textareaCharCount_info: Shows a live character counter that changes color as you approach the limit
elements.textareaDisabled_info: A read-only textarea that cannot be modified
elements.errorState_info: Demonstrates the error visual state with a validation message
elements.successState_info: Demonstrates the success visual state with a validation message
elements.fileInput_info: A file picker that opens the system file browser
elements.dropzone_info: Drag and drop files or click to browse — supports multiple file uploads
elements.dropzone_text: Drag & drop your files here or click to browse
elements.dropzone_formats: Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, AVIF — max 5 MB per file
elements.checkboxDefault_info: An unchecked checkbox in its default state
elements.checkboxChecked_info: A checkbox in its checked/selected state
elements.checkboxIndeterminate_info: A checkbox in an indeterminate (partial) state, used for group selection
elements.radioSelected_info: A radio button in its selected state
elements.radioUnselected_info: A radio button in its unselected/default state
elements.radioDisabled_info: A disabled radio button that cannot be interacted with
elements.toggleDefault_info: A toggle switch in its off/default state
elements.toggleChecked_info: A toggle switch in its on/checked state
elements.dateTimeDate_info: Select a date using the native browser date picker
elements.dateTimeTime_info: Select a time using the native browser time picker
elements.validation_info: TanStack Form fields with onChange Zod validation
elements.validationFullName_info: Enter your full name — must be at least 2 characters
elements.validationEmail_info: You must provide a valid email address in the format user@example.com
elements.validationPassword_info: Create a strong password with at least 8 characters including a number
elements.validationBio_info: A short biography describing yourself, up to 200 characters

layouts.heading: Form Layouts
layouts.description: Basic stacked, two-column grid, icon-prefixed, and sectioned card form patterns
layouts.contact_description: Basic single-column form with name, email, subject, and message
layouts.contactFullName_info: Enter your full name as it appears on official documents
layouts.contactEmail_info: You must provide a valid email address in the format user@example.com
layouts.contactSubject_info: Select the category that best describes your inquiry
layouts.contactMessage_info: Write your message in detail so we can best assist you
layouts.twoColumn_description: Side-by-side name fields with full-width email, subject, and message
layouts.twoColumnEmail_info: You must provide a valid email address in the format user@example.com
layouts.twoColumnSubject_info: Choose a subject category for your message
layouts.twoColumnMessage_info: Your message content with a 200 character limit
layouts.icon_description: Inputs with leading SVG icons and a remember-me checkbox
layouts.iconName_info: Enter your name — this field has a leading user icon
layouts.iconEmail_info: You must provide a valid email address in the format user@example.com
layouts.iconPassword_info: Enter your password — this field has a leading lock icon
layouts.iconRemember_info: Keep me signed in on this device
layouts.sectioned_description: Multiple card sections for complex data entry
layouts.sectionedFirstName_info: Your given name for your profile
layouts.sectionedLastName_info: Your family name for your profile
layouts.sectionedEmail_info: You must provide a valid email address in the format user@example.com
layouts.sectionedDob_info: Select your date of birth from the date picker
layouts.sectionedGender_info: Select your gender from the available options
layouts.sectionedCategory_info: Select the category that best describes your interests
layouts.sectionedStreet_info: Your street address including building or apartment number
layouts.sectionedZip_info: Your postal or ZIP code for mail delivery
layouts.sectionedPlan_info: Choose a membership plan that suits your needs
layouts.sectionedAgree_label: I agree to the terms and conditions
layouts.sectionedAgree_info: You must accept the terms and conditions to proceed
